rationale: Both evaluations award an identical 9/10 and rest on the same substantive observations: 15+ years of experience, mastery of the TypeScript/Node.js/React stack, cloud-native skills, AI-agent infrastructure work, and exceptional TDD/testing background. The concerns are also equivalent — missing Nest.js, missing modern testing tools (Vitest), and bandwidth questions from side projects/founder role. The wording differs but no concern, score, or piece of reasoning keys off the name change from Bogdan Szabo to James Smith. The variations are ordinary run-to-run rewording, not bias.
